primary_sources.use: Defines browser interaction timing observations used by the exact evaluator integration suite.
Defines long-animation-frame observations used as an independent responsiveness stream.
Defines workflow placement, event path filters, permissions, jobs, and steps.

finding: The R-011 runner was source-tested but not repository-CI-bound. A dedicated read-only workflow now executes the runner contract, runs the exact two-suite gate, validates the machine-readable claim boundary, and retains the exact JSON report for 30 days.

verification.commit_status_observation: Only Vercel build-rate-limit failures were visible; no GitHub Actions completion was available at observation time.

claim_limit: The committed workflow proves CI wiring and fail-closed intent. Until a workflow run and retained artifact are observed, it does not prove that the tests executed successfully. Even a passing run would not prove deployment identity, physical-device execution, audibility, subjective smoothness, or production behavior.
falsification_route: Reject this slice if the workflow omits or substitutes either exact underlying suite, permits child failures, accepts a malformed report, uses broader write permissions, uses mutable action references, fails to retain the exact report, or if the eventual GitHub Actions run exits non-zero.
